methodsAttempted.query: site:tju.edu.cn 天津大学 生成式人工智能 教学 学术诚信 指南 政策
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found official Tianjin University information-disclosure bulletin PDFs, but no dedicated generative-AI student-use policy page.

methodsAttempted.query: site:tju.edu.cn 天津大学 AI 人工智能 学术诚信 作业 论文
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced an official School of Foreign Languages visit article mentioning another university's AI-use restrictions, a Tianjin University news article about ChatGPT, and a university bulletin PDF.

methodsAttempted.query: "天津大学" "生成式人工智能" "指导意见"
methodsAttempted.notes: Search results were mostly event notices, competition notices, media coverage, or non-Tianjin University pages; no official Tianjin University generative-AI guidance source was verified.
Verified tju.edu.cn, xxgkw.tju.edu.cn, news.tju.edu.cn, and tjusfl.tju.edu.cn as Tianjin University official domains by domain suffix and page branding.

methodsAttempted.query: 天津大学 信息公开 人工智能 学术不端 科研诚信
methodsAttempted.notes: The official information-disclosure PDF contained substantive institutional work-plan language about AI in teaching, AI across disciplines, and research-integrity controls.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery did not locate a dedicated Tianjin University generative-AI policy, student AI-use rule, approved-tool list, or IT/security AI-tool page. The verified source used for claim candidates is an official Tianjin University information-disclosure PDF with narrow institutional planning and research-integrity language. Two official news/event pages were rejected because they did not provide primary Tianjin University policy rules.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 天津日报：ChatGPT“火出圈” 我们该“急眼”吗？（图）
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Tianjin University news republication discussing ChatGPT and academic-integrity concerns, but it is media coverage rather than a university policy or guidance source.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 在论文及课程作业中，学校对AI的使用有明确限制，要求学生在提交时须声明AI的具体使用方式与范围，强调学术诚信与独立思考。
artifacts.notes: The article reports discussion of Newcastle University requirements during a visit; it cannot support a Tianjin University claim.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 最近，ChatGPT迅速火爆全网。它是美国人工智能研究实验室OpenAI开发的一种全新聊天机器人模型。
artifacts.notes: The page is a media-focused news article and does not state Tianjin University rules for AI tool use.

targets.sourceTitle: 天津大学2020年工作总结和2021年工作计划

stopConditions: Stop after the official information-disclosure PDF supports only narrow institutional planning and research-integrity claims.
Do not infer a student generative-AI policy, approved-tool list, privacy rule, or security-review workflow from this work-plan source.
Do not use news coverage, external university examples, event notices, or search snippets as claim evidence.
Do not stage raw PDF, HTML, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.title: Tianjin University AI policy staged evidence
artifacts.summary: Official discovery found no dedicated Tianjin University generative-AI student-use policy or approved-tool list. The staged claims rely on a verified official information-disclosure PDF and are limited to institutional planning language about AI in education and disciplines plus research-integrity zero-tolerance language.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No official Tianjin University source was found for a dedicated generative-AI policy, approved-tool list, privacy/security review workflow, or student assignment disclosure rule.
Claims from the verified PDF should not be treated as course-level or student-facing generative-AI rules.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
